title: German Potato Fritters
description: Crispy potato fritters, a classic German vegetarian dish, ideal for a snack or side.
instructions: Squeeze out excess moisture from the grated potatoes using a cheesecloth or a clean kitchen towel.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and a pinch of salt.
Add the egg and melted butter to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Add the grated potatoes to the bowl and mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat the incredibly crunchy vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the potato mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot.
